name: @authensor/sdk
description: Authensor TypeScript SDK for agent builders

scripts.gen: cd ../schemas/src && json2ts -i action-envelope.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/action-envelope.ts && json2ts -i action-receipt.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/action-receipt.ts && json2ts -i policy.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/policy.ts
